{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322063310DABC77577FE028CB242A"}"},"total":5126},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7263745314267644735","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写出了一个宏大的世界观，一些细节描写的也不错，目前看来这本书还是可以值得一追的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691222628,"group_id":"7209942012030618662","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"嘿嘿","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2fI8BlMYS7Dzgb6UBV7x6vuz1kQibwXu7QuxI27nkti","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776700848&x-signature=IqKiHTwWvdI9JXrGcbswfncov9s%3D","user_id":"3870712289042187","user_name":"朋友师"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3870712289042187","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7209942012030618662","book_info":{"abstract":"末世降临，神祇高悬星海，一款名为深渊的游戏，笼罩全人类。
当神话照进现实，超凡触手可及，长生不再是梦。
人类最大的欲望伴随着灾难轻而易举的实现了。
高级法师随手就能陨石天降，万里冰封…
御兽师的天渊星熊，能将万里大山吼碎…
恐怖的刺客，瞬间就能将BOSS蒸发…
辅助成了版本之子，救死扶伤，地位崇高…
……
人类以游戏名义踏上了进化的狂潮，神性等级碾压着一切。
凿穿深渊十八层，越过那未知的三十三重天，神座上谁在低眸？
终有一日，我们必将举族成神！
而赵渊却走向了单刷之路，一个人族著名的肝帝冉冉升起。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/39c1b04f815912164b3eb817f8d161e3","author":"沧海有大鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7209942012030618662","book_name":"该死，我的游戏天赋是铁头娃？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7209942563816636962","read_count":"50338","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2404335"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"1026","tags":"科幻末世,系统,末世,求生,末日求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c83db16cf4ee5670c28d9d7507e76e30~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779316390&x-signature=H4yOFLWIPtuhxxEfUox8C44hT%2Bg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"610983869420108","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.4020447e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322063310DABC77577FE028CB242A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":64,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14020,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":120852},"user_action":{"au
